title: Disease Spread in Flower Grid
shortDescription: Implement algorithms to simulate and analyze the spread of disease through flowers arranged in a grid structure. Solve multiple related problems involving infection patterns, timing, and containment strategies.

Were You Asked This?
Disease Spread in Flower Grid

Implement algorithms to simulate and analyze the spread of disease through flowers arranged in a grid structure. Solve multiple related problems involving infection patterns, timing, and containment strategies.

Asked at:

OpenAI

Question Timeline

See when this question was last asked and where, including any notes left by other candidates.

Company
Company
Level
​
Level
Region
All Regions
Region

Early May, 2026

OpenAI

Senior

Infection spread with variant.

Every minute, an uninfected cell becomes infected only if at least T of its
4-directional neighbours (up, down, left, right) are already infected. Return the minimum number of minutes needed until no uninfected cells remain. If it is impossible for all uninfected cells to become infected, return -1. 

T=1 matches the classic single-neighbour spread rule.

Early May, 2026

OpenAI

Staff

Late April, 2026

OpenAI

Senior

interviewer does not care about optimized solution, go with what will pass the test cases

Mid April, 2026

OpenAI

Staff

There were 6 parts to the question. The interviewer stated that they do not expect candidates to get through all 6 parts. There were very detailed test cases for all 6 parts.
